name: google-calendar
description: Connect Codex to Google Calendar for scheduling, availability, and event management.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Google Calendar events and schedules
interface.longDescription: Use Codex with Google Calendar to check availability, list calendars, and create, update, or delete events directly from task prompts.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Google Calendar to find availability this week and schedule, update, or cancel the right event.
